verdict_summary: P5 cross-connection intercept failed: render-generation now blocked by CORS preflight (content-type not in Access-Control-Allow-Headers) instead of HTTP2 protocol error. Outline panel still empty, no Korean warning rendered.

evidence.render_generation_response_body_excerpt: Failed to load response data — No data found for resource with given identifier (request blocked by CORS preflight; net::ERR_FAILED)
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Access to fetch at 'https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/render-generation' from origin 'https://gamma.app' has been blocked by CORS policy: Request header field content-type is not allowed by Access-Control-Allow-Headers in preflight response. | POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/render-generation net::ERR_FAILED | Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to fetch (ai.api.gamma.app) | [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

recommendation: P5 partially landed (preflight is now intercepted with status 200 instead of timing out, AND the prior ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR is gone — confirming the request-side intercept path is reached). However the forged preflight response is missing 'content-type' in Access-Control-Allow-Headers. Browser blocks the actual POST before it reaches the engine, so the forged JSON envelope never gets a chance to ship. Fix: in the gamma render-generation preflight branch of on_http2_request, ensure the forged 200 OPTIONS response includes 'access-control-allow-headers: content-type, authorization, x-client-version, *' (or echo the request's access-control-request-headers value). Also verify access-control-allow-origin: https://gamma.app and access-control-allow-credentials: true are set. The /ai/v2/generation SSE itself is working (200, fetch type) — only render-generation needs the CORS preflight headers fix.
notes: Network panel shows: generation preflight 204, generation 200 (fetch), render-generation CORS error (red), render-generation preflight 200 (3ms — fast, indicating engine intercept handled it but with wrong headers). DOM check confirmed warning:false, outline panel only contains '윤곽선 / 1 / 카드 추가 / 총 카드 1개' (empty card 1). RRN regex match in body.innerText was solely from the prompt textarea echo (input field), NOT from any rendered response — so rrn_decode_absent=true. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) was performed and prior gamma tab was closed to flush poisoned H2 cache before this attempt. New build run_id=20260508-121642-42969 IS active (CORS error class change from HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR to CORS-policy proves the engine code path changed).
